title.rendered: PVEP Conference of Oil & Gas Services Providers 2016-2017

content.rendered:
On date 16th Feb 2017, Petro Vietnam Exploration and Production Corporation (PVEP) has organized a conference of oil & gas services providers 2016-2017, with the participation of 56 representatives of the services provider’s and PVEP’s partners

With the companionship of the services providers, PVEP has overcome immense challenges in 2016, implementation of production and business activities to ensure absolute safety, and successful completion of the oil and gas exploration target 2016 in 30 days ahead while still maintaining the stability of the entire corporation.

Speaking at the conference, Dr. Ngo Huu Hai, CEO of PVEP, emphasized the important role of  service providers which has supported and co-operated with PVEP to get achievements  2016 – one year of difficulty for oil and gas industry in Vietnam and overall World. PVEP continues looking forward to receiving more sympathized companionship of the services providers in coming years

To recognize and appreciate the contributions of the services providers to oil and gas production and business activities of the corporation, PVEP honored and awarded medals for the top 20 services providers in 2016.
